description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-seater sofa with a bold, solid red exterior frame and pale, marble-textured seat and back cushions. The sofa features high, straight armrests that are level with the backrest, creating a clean-lined, geometric silhouette. The seat and back cushions are divided into two equal sections, each appearing thick and plush, with a subtle, wavy texture that suggests softness. The frame is monolithic and fully encloses the sides and back, with no visible legs or underframe, giving the sofa a grounded, block-like appearance. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible buttons, tufting, or decorative elements, emphasizing a contemporary urban aesthetic. The contrasting colors and materials between the frame and cushions add visual interest and a sense of comfort.
description: A modern, boxy red sofa with high straight armrests and two pale, plush, marble-textured cushions. The design is minimalist and geometric, with a solid frame and no visible legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick red armrest and the profile of the two pale seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two individual pale cushions and the wide, solid red frame enclosing the seating area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same thick armrest and cushion profile visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the solid, uninterrupted red back panel with the tops of the pale cushions just visible above the frame.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, rectangular seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all uniform in size and placed side by side; cushions appear loose but fit snugly within the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: High, straight armrests that are level with the backrest, forming a continuous, boxy profile with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the sofa frame extends fully to the ground, giving a block-like, monolithic appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two individual, thick back cushions; the backrest is continuous and flush with the armrests.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid red exterior frame with pale, marble-textured cushions; the cushions have a subtle, wavy pattern suggesting softness, with no visible stitching or tufting.
